name: historical_notes
Battle of Thapsus: Compressed Thapsus: Caesar faces Scipio's Optimate army and Juba's Numidian support near the coast with the enemy elephant line represented by heavy chariot proxy units.

name: ROMAN
column4: use veteran infantry and missiles to panic the elephant line before striking Scipio's legions
column5: destroy the African Optimate army at the coast

name: POMPEIAN
column4: send the elephant line and Numidian cavalry forward while the legions hold behind them
column5: disrupt Caesar's front before the veterans close
